nasb.text: A young man was following Him, wearing nothing but a linen sheet over his naked body; and they *seized him.

esv.text: And a young man followed him, with nothing but a linen cloth about his body. And they seized him,

cnv.text: 有一個青年，赤身披著一塊麻布，跟著耶穌。眾人捉住他的時候，

ccb.text: 只有一个身上披着一块麻布的青年跟着耶稣。他们上去捉他，

csbs.text: 有一个年轻人，赤身披上一块细麻布，跟在耶稣后面。那些人就抓住他，
